name: L3Harris Technologies, Inc.
description: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. is an American technology company, defense contractor, and information technology services provider that produces C6ISR systems and products, wireless equipment, tactical radios, avionics and electronic systems, night vision equipment, and both terrestrial and spaceborne antennas for use in the government, defense, and commercial sectors. Formed from the merger of L3 Technologies and Harris Corporation in 2019, the company is headquartered in Melbourne, Florida, and operates as one of the largest aerospace and defense companies in the world, providing mission-critical solutions for customers across air, land, sea, space, and cyber domains.
